evals.expected_output: Should show the quick reference guide: project state, method summary, available skills, and process files

assertions.text: Shows the current state of BRIEF.md and CREATIVE_DIRECTION.md
Lists available skills with their use cases

evals.prompt: Show me the playbook. BRIEF.md still has placeholders.
evals.expected_output: Should show the guide and suggest running /setup since the brief is not filled in

assertions.text: Identifies that BRIEF.md is not filled in

evals.expected_output: Should read the creative SKILL.md and provide a summary of what it does and when to use it

assertions.text: Explains the creative skill's purpose (divergent exploration)

evals.prompt: Playbook. Both BRIEF.md and CREATIVE_DIRECTION.md are filled in.
evals.expected_output: Should confirm the project is configured and suggest starting work or using /creative

assertions.text: Suggests next steps like /creative or starting work
